evaluators.name: Cheapest Rear Extension Quote Request Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user requested a quote for the cheapest 20–30 sqm rear extension under $80,000 with correct postcode, budget, and note.

evaluators.name: Cheapest Kitchen Renovation Consultation Booking Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user booked a weekday afternoon consultation for the cheapest kitchen renovation package under $35,000 on a Wednesday between 2–4 pm.

evaluators.name: Larger Floor-Area Extension Shortlist Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user compared extension packages under $120,000 and added the one with the larger added floor area to their shortlist.

evaluators.name: Loft Conversion Ideas List Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user saved three loft conversion projects (2023 or later, rating ≥ 4.5) to their Ideas list.

evaluators.name: Full Home Renovation Cost Estimate Email Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user created a 3-bed, 2-bath full home renovation estimate with mid-range finishes and $180,000 budget, then emailed the summary to user@example.com.

evaluators.name: Planning Permit Article Reading List Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user searched for a 2023+ planning permit extensions article, saved a qualifying article to the reading list, and reopened it from that list.

evaluators.name: Bathroom Renovation Warranty FAQ Contact Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user used the bathroom renovation warranty FAQ’s contact link to send a follow-up question with appropriate subject and contact details.

evaluators.name: Multi-Project Renovation Plan Submission Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user submitted a renovation plan containing a $20,000 apartment bathroom renovation and a $25,000 house deck extension, with contact details filled in.
